title: Return to Sabaody: Turning Point
description: In the Return to Sabaody storyline, this section centers on Usopp, Duval, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #19, Sanji as the scene develops across pages 14–17.
scene: This scene advances the Return to Sabaody conflict through Usopp, Duval, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #19, focusing on the immediate stakes of return to sabaody: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Onward I fought, swathed in wounds...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: And the third to arrive was nami-chan...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Nami-San is shopping... Nami-San is shopping...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And that makes you the sixth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: He must be outrageously strong by now.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What on earth is going on here...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Are you embarrassed? You dummies!! AHAHA...

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: Like I said take a look!!

summary: This scene advances the Return to Sabaody conflict through Usopp, Duval, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #19, focusing on the immediate stakes of return to sabaody: turning point.
